label: Generic — product interest, no cart/checkout click

output.inferred_need: Confidence to add to cart — shipping, fit, trust, or price clarity
output.message_angle: De-risk the purchase with reviews, guarantees, or a nudge tied to what they viewed
output.offer_type: Cart-saving prompt, shipping clarity, bundle, or small incentive
output.surface: Product page inline or exit-intent light touch
output.timing: After multi-product browsing or deep scroll on PDP
output.recommended_activation_summary: E-commerce visitor browsing deeply across products without cart/checkout clicks — reinforce trust and value (reviews, shipping/returns, bundle) before a harder checkout push.
